Sepolia rehearsal: MasterTreasury.registerVault(84532, 0x474Df…F7Bc) via direct EOA cast send 2026-05-10, tx 0x3bf25b58ba4071bf302a6c92a8dafb51d07c2b37aec93bf128361156242a5503, block 41331566. Sepolia governance is the rehearsal EOA; mainnet governance is the Warm Safe.

residual: Sprint Mode mainnet treasury OPERATIONAL on Base (8453): MasterTreasury 0xbf54...fd7f and per-chain Vault 0x6471...2bdC are live, registeredChainCount() == 1, EVM-side tier1 tokens (USDC, ETH) routed via the Vault. Non-EVM tier1 tokens (AR, TAO) remain pending separate non-EVM rail integration.
